prompt_text: A tense courtroom-like confrontation inside an ancient Chinese noble mansion hall, Gao Lingning standing at the left foreground as the central judged figure, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura; Lu Shuyi kneeling in the center lower frame, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, fragile yet calculating expression, crying and pleading upward; Shen Ci at the right by a desk, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, standing in tense silence; Jiang Sheng half-hidden near a rear pillar, a tall, upright young Chinese man from a historical drama, athletic but not bulky, honest and restrained expression, clear long eyes, straight nose, neat black topknot, dark indigo round-collar robe with light armor-like riding details, humble yet dependable aura, slight blush on ears; servants and maids gathered by the doorway in the background, watching from both sides like witnesses. Slightly high angle from Gao Lingning's side of the axis, full shot, blurred doorframe pressing in from the right foreground, figures split across the hall to form a ceremonial trap. Side daylight slants through doors and windows, cutting the wooden floor into bright and dark halves, low-saturation gray-blue, ink-black, old wood brown, and amber highlights, restrained warm-cool contrast, oppressive enclosed interior, legalistic ritual atmosphere. Cinematic realism, Song dynasty aesthetics, layered spatial blocking, shallow foreground occlusion, highly detailed historical drama still, subtle film grain
